overall.description: A cinematic third-person video game sequence showing a cloaked character walking through a narrow canyon at sunset. The character approaches and passes a small group of travelers before continuing toward a distant valley opening, with dramatic golden hour lighting illuminating the rocky walls and wet riverbed.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with wet riverbed floor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon toward the distant sunset, cloak flowing with movement

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary textures forming the left boundary
steep rock wall with sparse vegetation patches on the right side
wet muddy ground with shallow water reflecting the golden sunset light
golden orange sky with scattered clouds visible through the canyon opening ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone through a narrow canyon passage, flanked by tall rocky walls on both sides. The wet riverbed reflects the warm golden light of the setting sun visible ahead, creating a serene and isolated atmosphere.

events.description: group of travelers becomes visible in the distance ahead, walking in the same direction
character passes the group of travelers on the left side and continues forward

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a group of fellow travelers in the canyon, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: group of three travelers walking ahead in the canyon, silhouetted against the sunset

entered.detail: tall jagged rock formations visible on the horizon beyond the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the canyon, a group of travelers appears in the distance ahead. The character approaches and passes them on the left side, while the canyon walls loom closer and distant rock pinnacles become visible on the horizon beyond the valley opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, isolated canyon that gradually opens toward a distant horizon. It begins with a lone cloaked character walking along a wet riverbed, where the towering rocky walls reflect the warm, golden glow of the setting sun. As the character advances, the serene solitude shifts as a group of travelers emerges in the distance. The camera continues to track the character as they pass the travelers on the left, while the looming canyon walls begin to recede. The scene finally expands to reveal sharp rock pinnacles rising against the horizon beyond the valley opening.
